name: South of the Border Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Chopped red and green pepper
1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables with liquid (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet; add tortilla strips and fry, stirring constantly, until golden. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
2. Add onion and pepper to the skillet and cook until soft.
3. Add garlic and stir in flour; then gradually stir in chicken broth.
4. Add remaining ingredients and heat through.
